message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. I can help identify the account and document your position, but I can’t discuss terms in this chat. We’re discussing the account ending in ****8824. To proceed, please verify your identity using your full name and either your date of birth or postal code.
If you can’t discuss terms here, I’m not verifying identity just to be transferred—send the concrete settlement amount and payment deadline, or I’ll close this out another way.

Understood. I’m not able to provide settlement amounts or deadlines in this chat, and I won’t ask you to verify further if you do not want to continue here. I’ve noted that you declined verification and requested concrete terms only. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.
